positive: Stylized minimalist illustration featuring a group of stylized forest creatures (fox, owl, rabbit, bear) arranged in a cohesive, magical circle. The style is inspired by whimsical Scandinavian folk art and vintage children's book etching, rendered with clean, thick black line work and limited color palette (deep teal, burnt orange, forest green). The subjects are central and facing outwards, maintaining clean silhouettes with minimal internal shading. The composition must be highly scalable for apparel printing, with ample negative space surrounding the central grouping. Use high contrast between the linework and the background. Vector graphic quality, perfect symmetry, kawaii but sophisticated aesthetic.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, jpeg artifacts, cropped, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, poorly drawn, low detail, messy, dirty, highly realistic, photographic, photorealism
